scripts.lint: npm run lint:repo && npm run lint:web && npm run lint:go
scripts.lint:repo: biome lint scripts .github/workflows package.json biome.json README.md docs test
scripts.lint:web: npm run typecheck --prefix frontend/learner && npm run typecheck --prefix frontend/admin && npm run typecheck --prefix test
scripts.format: npm run format:web && npm run format:go
scripts.format:web: biome format --write scripts .github/workflows package.json biome.json README.md docs test
scripts.format:check: npm run format:check:web && npm run format:check:go
scripts.format:check:web: biome format --check scripts .github/workflows package.json biome.json README.md docs test
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix frontend/learner && npm run typecheck --prefix frontend/admin && npm run typecheck --prefix test
scripts.test: cd backend && go test ./... && cd .. && npm run test --prefix frontend/learner && npm run test --prefix frontend/admin
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend/learner && npm run build --prefix frontend/admin
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build && npm run check --prefix test
